Description (Card): As a Buyer/Seller, I want to be able to self-register with my details so that I can access the Used Car marketplace.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
*User should be able to enter the following information in the screen;
1.Personal Information:
- Full Name: A text field for the user's name (Maximum 50 characters, alphabets and spaces only)
- Email: A text field to capture the Email (must follow standard email format with @ and domain)
- Mobile Number: A 10-digit numeric text field with country code dropdown (+91 default)
- City: A dropdown select box with major Indian cities (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata, Others)
- Role: A radio button selection for Buyer or Seller

2.Username and Password:
- User ID: A text field (minimum 5, maximum 20 characters, alphanumeric only)
- Password: A text field (minimum 8 characters, must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one special character)
- Confirm Password: Must match the Password field exactly

3.Buttons:
- Register: Submit button that validates all fields before submission
- Reset: Clears all form fields to default values

* After clicking 'Register', all inputs must be validated. If any field is invalid, display a specific red-colored error message below the respective field.
* On successful registration, store the user object in LocalStorage under a 'users' key array and display a success message: 'Registration Successful! Your User ID is <userID>' in green color.
* Duplicate User ID or Email should not be allowed. Display error: 'User ID already exists' or 'Email already registered'.

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to be able to login with my credentials so that I can browse and purchase cars.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
Login page should have below details:

-Username and Password:
- User ID: A text field (minimum 5, maximum 20 characters)
- Password: A text field (Maximum 30 characters)

-Validation:
- Both fields are mandatory. If either is empty, display 'Please fill in all fields' in red.
- On clicking Login, verify credentials against the users array stored in LocalStorage.
- If credentials do not match, display error message: 'Invalid User ID or Password' in red color.

-Successful Login:
- User should be redirected to the Buyer Homepage/Dashboard.
- Store the currently logged-in user details in LocalStorage under 'currentUser' key.
- Display 'Welcome <Full Name>' on the dashboard.

-Additional:
- A 'New User? Register here' link should navigate to the Registration page.
- A 'Forgot Password?' link should display a simulated password hint message.

Description (Card): As a Seller, I want to login to the application so that I can manage my car listings.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
Login page should have below details:

-Username and Password:
- User ID: A text field (minimum 5, maximum 20 characters)
- Password: A text field (Maximum 30 characters)

-Validation:
- On clicking Login, verify credentials against the users array in LocalStorage.
- Check that the user's role is 'Seller'. If role is 'Buyer', display: 'Access denied. Please use Buyer login.'

-Successful Login:
- Seller should be redirected to the Seller Dashboard with seller-specific menu options.
- Display 'Welcome <Full Name> (Seller)' at the top right.

-Error Handling:
- Display appropriate specific error messages for invalid credentials.
- After 3 consecutive failed login attempts, display: 'Account temporarily locked. Try again after refreshing the page.'

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to view the Home Page with navigation and featured cars so that I can quickly explore the marketplace.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* After login to the system, buyer can view the home page with following information:
- At the top right, display 'Welcome <username>' with a user avatar icon
- Top navigation bar should have the following menu items:
1) Home – On clicking, redirect to the same page
2) Browse Cars – On clicking, navigate to Car Listings page
3) My Wishlist – On clicking, navigate to Wishlist page showing saved cars
4) Recently Viewed – On clicking, navigate to Recently Viewed Cars page
5) My Purchases – On clicking, navigate to Purchase History page
6) Compare Cars – On clicking, navigate to Car Comparison page
7) Contact Support – On clicking, navigate to Support/Help page
8) Logout – On clicking, clear 'currentUser' from LocalStorage and redirect to Login page

* Featured Cars Section:
- Display top 4 cars with the highest Health Score from LocalStorage
- Each car card should show: Car Image placeholder, Make, Model, Year, Price (formatted with commas), and Health Score badge (color-coded: Green for 70+, Yellow for 40-69, Red for below 40)
- Clicking a car card should navigate to the Car Details page

* Recommendation Section:
- Display heading 'Recommended for You'
- Show 3 cars filtered based on the buyer's last viewed car's price range (±20%) and fuel type
- If no viewing history exists, show 3 most recently listed cars

* Search Bar:
- A prominent search bar at the top allowing quick search by car make or model name

Description (Card): As a Seller, I want to view my Dashboard with my listings and performance metrics so that I can manage my car business.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* After login, seller can view the dashboard with following information:
- At the top right, display 'Welcome <username> (Seller)' with seller badge icon
- Top navigation bar should have:
1) Dashboard – On clicking, redirect to the same page
2) My Listings – On clicking, navigate to Seller's car listings page
3) Add New Car – On clicking, navigate to Add Car form
4) My Reviews – On clicking, navigate to page showing buyer reviews and ratings
5) Sales History – On clicking, navigate to completed sales page
6) Contact Support – On clicking, navigate to Support page
7) Logout – On clicking, clear session and redirect to Login page

* Seller Performance Section:
- Total Cars Listed: Count of all cars added by this seller from LocalStorage
- Cars Sold: Count of cars with status 'sold'
- Cars Available: Count of cars with status 'available'
- Average Rating: Calculated from reviews array in LocalStorage, displayed as star rating (1-5)

* My Active Listings Section:
- Display all 'available' cars listed by this seller as cards
- Each card shows: Make, Model, Year, Price, Health Score, View Count, and a Fraud Flag warning icon if flagged

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to browse all available cars with smart filters so that I can find cars matching my preferences.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Car Listing page should display all cars with status 'available' from LocalStorage.

* Each car should be displayed as a card with:
- Car image placeholder (colored div based on car make)
- Make and Model as title
- Year | Fuel Type | Transmission as subtitle
- Price displayed prominently with rupee symbol and comma formatting
- Health Score badge (color-coded: Green 70-100, Yellow 40-69, Red 0-39)
- Fraud Warning: If the car's price is more than 40% below the average price for the same make and year, display a red 'Price Alert' badge
- Wishlist heart icon (toggle to add/remove from wishlist)
- View Count: Display number of times the car has been viewed

* Smart Filter Panel (Left Sidebar):
- Price Range: Two input fields (Min and Max) with Apply button
- Brand/Make: Checkbox list of all available makes (dynamically populated from data)
- Fuel Type: Checkbox options (Petrol, Diesel, CNG, Electric)
- Transmission: Checkbox options (Manual, Automatic)
- Year Range: Two dropdown selects for From Year and To Year
- Health Score: Dropdown (Excellent 80+, Good 60-79, Fair 40-59, All)
- Clear All Filters button to reset all filters

* Sorting Options (Top bar):
- Sort by: Price Low to High, Price High to Low, Newest First, Highest Health Score
- Display total count of results: 'Showing X of Y cars'

* On clicking any car card, navigate to Car Details page and increment the view count for that car in LocalStorage.
* Also store the car ID in the user's 'recentlyViewed' array in LocalStorage with timestamp.

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to view complete details of a car including health score and seller rating so that I can make an informed purchase decision.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Car Details page should retrieve car data from LocalStorage using carId parameter.

* Car Information Section:
- Large image placeholder area
- Make, Model, Year as heading
- Price displayed prominently (formatted: ₹X,XX,XXX)
- Status badge: 'Available' in green or 'Sold' in red

* Specifications Table:
- Fuel Type
- Transmission
- Mileage (formatted with commas, e.g., 45,000 km)
- Color
- Registration Year
- Listing Date

* Car Health Score Section:
- Display calculated Health Score as a circular progress indicator
- Formula: score = 100 - (currentYear - carYear) * 3 - (mileage / 10000) * 2, clamped between 0 and 100
- Color coding: Green (70-100 Excellent), Yellow (40-69 Good), Red (0-39 Poor)
- Display breakdown: 'Age Deduction: -X points | Mileage Deduction: -X points'

* Fraud Detection Section:
- Calculate average price of all cars with the same make and year from LocalStorage
- If this car's price is more than 40% below the average, display a red warning box: '⚠ Price Alert: This car is priced significantly below market average. Exercise caution.'
- If price is within normal range, display green text: '✓ Price is within market range'

* Price Comparison Indicator:
- Display: 'Market Average for <Make> <Year>: ₹X,XX,XXX'
- Show percentage difference: 'This car is X% below/above market average'

* Seller Information Section:
- Seller Name, City, Member Since date
- Seller Rating: Display average rating as stars (out of 5) calculated from reviews in LocalStorage
- Total cars sold by this seller
- 'Contact Seller' button (displays seller phone and email in a modal popup)

* Action Buttons:
- 'Add to Wishlist' / 'Remove from Wishlist' toggle button
- 'Buy This Car' button (navigates to Purchase Confirmation page)
- 'Compare' button (adds car to comparison list in LocalStorage, max 3 cars)

* People Also Viewed Section:
- Display 3 cars with the same fuel type or similar price range (±15%) excluding the current car
- Each shown as a mini card with Make, Model, Price, and Health Score

Description (Card): As a Seller, I want to add a new car listing with all details so that buyers can discover and purchase my car.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Add Car form should have the following fields:

1. Car Details:
- Make: Dropdown select (Maruti, Hyundai, Honda, Toyota, Tata, Mahindra, Kia, Ford, Volkswagen, BMW, Others)
- Model: Text field (Maximum 30 characters)
- Year: Dropdown select (from 2000 to current year)
- Color: Dropdown select (White, Black, Silver, Red, Blue, Grey, Others)

2. Performance Details:
- Fuel Type: Radio buttons (Petrol, Diesel, CNG, Electric)
- Transmission: Radio buttons (Manual, Automatic)
- Mileage: Numeric text field (in kilometers, must be positive number, max 500000)

3. Pricing:
- Price: Numeric text field (in rupees, minimum 25000, maximum 10000000)
- Display a real-time market comparison as the seller types the price: 'Average price for <Make> <Year>: ₹X,XX,XXX' fetched from existing listings in LocalStorage

4. Buttons:
- Submit Listing: Validates all fields, generates a unique car ID, calculates Health Score automatically, sets status to 'available', stores listing date as current date, and saves to LocalStorage under 'cars' array
- Reset: Clears all form fields
- Preview: Shows a read-only preview of how the listing will appear to buyers

* Validation Rules:
- All fields are mandatory. Display specific error messages below each empty/invalid field in red.
- Mileage must be a positive number. Display: 'Please enter valid mileage'
- Price must be between 25,000 and 1,00,00,000. Display: 'Price must be between ₹25,000 and ₹1,00,00,000'

* On successful submission:
- Display success message: 'Car listed successfully! Listing ID: <carID>' in green
- Automatically calculate and store Fraud Flag if price deviates more than 40% from average for same make and year
- Redirect to Seller Dashboard after 2 seconds

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to view and manage my saved/wishlisted cars so that I can revisit cars I am interested in.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Wishlist page should retrieve the current user's wishlist from LocalStorage.

* Display:
- Page heading: 'My Wishlist (X cars)' showing total count
- If wishlist is empty, display: 'Your wishlist is empty. Browse cars to add some!' with a 'Browse Cars' button linking to Car Listings page

* Each wishlisted car displayed as a card:
- Car image placeholder
- Make, Model, Year
- Price (formatted with ₹ and commas)
- Health Score badge (color-coded)
- Date Added to wishlist
- Status indicator: 'Available' in green or 'Sold' in red (check current status from cars array)

* Action Buttons per card:
- 'View Details' – Navigate to Car Details page
- 'Remove from Wishlist' – Remove the car from wishlist array in LocalStorage, update the count, and show confirmation: 'Removed from wishlist'
- 'Buy Now' – Navigate to Purchase Confirmation (only if status is 'available', otherwise button is disabled with tooltip: 'This car has been sold')

* If a wishlisted car has been sold by another buyer, display a visual strikethrough on the price and an 'SOLD' overlay on the card.

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to see my recently viewed cars so that I can quickly return to cars I was browsing.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Recently Viewed page should retrieve the 'recentlyViewed' array for the current user from LocalStorage.

* Display:
- Page heading: 'Recently Viewed Cars'
- Cars displayed in reverse chronological order (most recently viewed first)
- Maximum of 10 most recent entries shown
- Each entry shows: Make, Model, Year, Price, Health Score badge, and 'Viewed on <date and time>'

* Each card should have:
- 'View Again' button – Navigate to Car Details page
- 'Add to Wishlist' button – Add to wishlist if not already present
- Availability status: 'Available' or 'Sold'

* If no recently viewed cars exist, display: 'You have not viewed any cars yet. Start browsing!' with a link to Car Listings page.

* Duplicate entries should not appear. If a car is viewed multiple times, only the most recent timestamp should be kept and the car should appear once at the top.

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to compare multiple cars side by side so that I can evaluate which car is the best deal.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Compare Cars page should retrieve the comparison list from LocalStorage.

* Comparison Table:
- Display selected cars as columns (minimum 2, maximum 3 cars)
- Row attributes for comparison:
  1) Car Image placeholder
  2) Make and Model
  3) Year
  4) Price (formatted)
  5) Fuel Type
  6) Transmission
  7) Mileage
  8) Health Score (with color-coded badge)
  9) Seller Rating (stars)
  10) Fraud Flag status
  11) Price vs Market Average (percentage)

* The best value in each row should be highlighted in green:
- Lowest price highlighted
- Lowest mileage highlighted
- Highest health score highlighted
- Highest seller rating highlighted

* Action Buttons:
- 'Remove' button on each column header to remove a car from comparison
- 'Add More Cars' button (navigates to Car Listings page, disabled if 3 cars already selected)
- 'Clear All' button to remove all cars from comparison list

* If fewer than 2 cars are in the comparison list, display: 'Add at least 2 cars to compare. Browse cars to add.' with a link to Car Listings page.

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to purchase a car through a confirmation flow so that I can complete my transaction.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Purchase Confirmation page should display:

1. Order Summary Section:
- Car details: Make, Model, Year, Color
- Price: Displayed prominently with ₹ formatting
- Seller Name and Rating
- Health Score badge

2. Buyer Confirmation:
- Display logged-in buyer's name and contact details (pre-filled from LocalStorage)
- Checkbox: 'I confirm that I want to purchase this car' (mandatory to proceed)

3. Simulated Payment Section:
- Payment Method: Radio buttons (Cash, Bank Transfer, EMI)
- If EMI selected, display EMI calculator: show monthly installment for 12, 24, and 36 months at 9% interest rate

4. Action Buttons:
- 'Confirm Purchase' button (disabled until checkbox is checked):
  a) Update car status to 'sold' in LocalStorage
  b) Create a purchase record with purchaseId, carId, buyerId, sellerId, purchaseDate, amount and store in 'purchases' array
  c) Remove car from buyer's wishlist if present
  d) Display success screen: 'Purchase Successful! Transaction ID: <purchaseId>' in green with a summary
- 'Cancel' button – Navigate back to Car Details page

* If the car is already sold (status check), display: 'Sorry, this car has already been sold' and disable the Confirm Purchase button.

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to rate and review a seller after purchasing a car so that other buyers can make informed decisions.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* After a successful purchase, display a 'Rate this Seller' prompt on the Purchase Success screen.

* Review Form:
- Star Rating: Clickable 1 to 5 stars (required)
- Review Comment: Text area (maximum 200 characters, optional)
- Submit Review button

* On submission:
- Store the review object in 'reviews' array in LocalStorage with: reviewId, sellerId, buyerId, rating, comment, reviewDate
- Display confirmation: 'Thank you for your review!'
- The seller's average rating should be recalculated across all their reviews

* Viewing Reviews (on Seller's profile or Car Details page):
- Display average rating as stars with numeric value (e.g., ★★★★☆ 4.2)
- Display total number of reviews: '(X reviews)'
- List individual reviews showing: Buyer name (first name only), Rating stars, Comment text, Review date
- Reviews sorted by most recent first

* Validation:
- A buyer can only review a seller once per purchase. If already reviewed, display: 'You have already reviewed this seller for this purchase.'

Description (Card): As a Buyer, I want to view my purchase history so that I can track all cars I have bought.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Purchase History page should retrieve all purchases for the current buyer from 'purchases' array in LocalStorage.

* Display:
- Page heading: 'My Purchases (X total)'
- Each purchase displayed as a card showing:
  a) Transaction ID
  b) Car Make, Model, Year
  c) Purchase Date (formatted as DD-MMM-YYYY)
  d) Amount Paid (formatted with ₹ and commas)
  e) Seller Name and Rating at time of purchase

* Each card should have:
- 'View Car Details' button – Navigate to Car Details page (read-only, showing 'Sold' status)
- 'Rate Seller' button – Navigate to Review form (only if not already reviewed)

* Summary Section at the top:
- Total Amount Spent: Sum of all purchase amounts, formatted
- Total Cars Bought: Count of purchases
- Most Recent Purchase: Date of last purchase

* If no purchases exist, display: 'You have not purchased any cars yet. Start browsing!' with a link to Car Listings page.

Description (Card): As a User, I want to access a support page so that I can get help with using the platform.
Acceptance Criteria (Confirmation):
* The Contact Support page should display the following information:

1. Contact Details Section:
- Phone: +91-1800-XXX-XXXX (Toll Free)
- Email: support@usedcarmart.com
- Working Hours: Mon-Sat, 9 AM - 6 PM IST
- Office Address: Display a placeholder address

2. FAQ Section:
- Display at least 5 frequently asked questions as expandable accordion items:
  a) How do I list my car for sale?
  b) How is the Car Health Score calculated?
  c) What does the Price Alert warning mean?
  d) How do I contact a seller?
  e) Can I cancel a purchase?
- Each FAQ expands/collapses on click showing the answer text

3. Feedback Form:
- Name: Pre-filled from logged-in user (read-only)
- Subject: Dropdown (General Inquiry, Report a Bug, Report Fraud, Feedback, Other)
- Message: Text area (minimum 20 characters, maximum 500 characters)
- Submit button: Stores feedback in LocalStorage under 'feedbacks' array and displays: 'Thank you for your feedback! We will get back to you shortly.' in green

* Navigation: A 'Back to Home' button at the bottom of the page.
